applied_patches.title: [LLVMCPU][RISCV] Add RVV int8 vector-contract custom kernels for widening i8*i8->i32 matmul
applied_patches.rationale: Direct match for elizanpu.gemm_s8 (M<=3, N<=3, K<=7) widening i8*i8->i32; hardware-validated on SpacemiT X60. Generates RVV mmt4d ukernel via vwmul+vwadd intrinsics plus widening-i8 tile enumeration in CPUEncodingExternalModels.

apply_verification.patched_tree_diff_sha256_method: sha256 over (git diff HEAD || cat runtime/src/iree/builtins/ukernel/arch/riscv_64/mmt4d_riscv_64_v_i8.c) on external/iree at d9a3dd15
